top_findings.summary: The skill claims to be a database query tool for accessing external materials repositories, yet requests broad local system permissions (Write, Glob, Bash) that are excessive for its primary API-based purpose. A database query tool should primarily require network access to external APIs; Write access could allow arbitrary file modifications, Glob enables filesystem traversal, and Bash permits arbitrary command execution—capabilities unrelated to querying remote materials databases and which pose significant security risks if misused.
